For the complete service between London, WoNing and Guildford see table 152
For the complete service between Havant and Portsmouth see table 157
 
NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
X
Stops to pick up only
e
Arrives 5 minutes earlier
g
Arrives 4 minutes earlier
A
Also calls at Vauxhall 0509, Wimbledon 0521, Surbiton 0528, WaltonOnThames 0535, Weybridge 0539 and West Byfleet 0543
B
To Southampton Central. Also calls at Cosham 0909, Portchester 0914, Fareham 0919, Swanwick 0926, Netley 0933, Woolston 0940,
St Denys 0946 and Southampton Central 0951

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
V
Stops to set down only
X
Stops to pick up only
f
Arrives 3 minutes earlier
C
To Fareham. Also calls at Cosham 2008, Portchester 2013 and Fareham 2020
D

Southampton Central 2153

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
V
Stops to set down only
X
Stops to pick up only
e
Arrives 3 minutes earlier
C
To Fareham. Also calls at Cosham 2008, Portchester 2013 and Fareham 2021
D
To Southampton Central. Also calls at Cosham 2109, Portchester 2114, Fareham 2119, Swanwick 2126, Netley 2134, Woolston 2141 and
Southampton Central 2153

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
V
Stops to set down only
X
Stops to pick up only
c
Arrives 3 minutes earlier
A
To Southampton Central. Also calls at Cosham 2135, Fareham 2143, Swanwick 2149, Netley 2156, Woolston 2201 and
Southampton Central 2210
